name: skos-broader-transitive-declared
query: PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> ASK WHERE { skos:broader <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#subPropertyOf> skos:broaderTransitive }

name: skos-transitive-inverse-declared
query: PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> ASK WHERE { skos:broaderTransitive <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#inverseOf> skos:narrowerTransitive }
